description: Hub-and-spoke gateway where a Bun WebSocket server mediates between a React SPA and two external subsystems (Ludus cyber range, Caldera adversary emulation) plus a binary RDP tunnel. The frontend organizes features into domain tabs with sequential prerequisite gating, all communicating with the backend through a single WebSocket client singleton. RDP traffic bypasses the JSON hub via a separate WebSocket route.

components.name: WebSocket Communication Layer
components.description: Central bidirectional message bridge. Server side (poller.js) registers typed operations via addOperation/addFetcher and dispatches them to backend modules. Client side (backend-ws.ts) is a singleton WebSocket with send-queue, subscriber pattern, and auto-reconnect.

components.name: Ludus Range & Template Management
components.description: Server-side proxy to the Ludus cyber-range REST API. Handles VM lifecycle, Ansible provisioning, template building, range config, and system info.

components.name: RDP Proxy Tunnel
components.description: Binary pass-through tunnel for in-browser RDP. Implements RDCleanPath protocol (ASN.1 DER encoded). Routes separately from JSON hub via ws.data.isRdp. Performs TCP/TLS handshake to VM port 3389, relays bytes bidirectionally.

components.name: Caldera Adversary Emulation
components.description: Coordinates with MITRE Caldera on the Kali VM. Queries Caldera REST API (Kali:8888) for ATT&CK abilities, merges with locally-stored custom abilities in Bun SQLite.

components.name: Lab Range State Machine
components.description: React state machine managing the full lab provisioning lifecycle: health check → template verification → template building → YAML editing → deployment → Caldera setup → golden image snapshots.

components.name: Attack Configuration Engine
components.description: MITRE ATT&CK technique browser and AI-assisted ability editor. Cluster 8 is data fetching and hierarchical tree; cluster 9 is the AI chat interface using SSE streaming.

components.name: Frontend Application Shell
components.description: Root layout organizing 7 domain tabs with prerequisite gating. Cluster 10 is tab navigation/routing; cluster 11 is the layout shell.
